name: YUQI
title: Two Lives Under One Name

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

passive.name: Full Burst / Tempo
passive.description: The [FOREVER] effect is activated on the entire team when entering the Encore Mission and Instance Dungeon (+5% damage dealt, stacks up to 3 times, Infinite). When YUQI or an ally successfully puts an enemy into [Break], Break duration increases by 3s. Using Amp Crash, Crescendo Scream, Rising Spin Kick, or Unlimited Shout activates Shouting Kick. Each time Shouting Kick, Amp Crash, or Rising Spin Kick hits, the user activates [Tempo] (Max HP +0.5%, Shouting Kick damage +0.5%, Duration: 10s, stacks up to 15 times) and recharges the [Full Burst] gauge. When [Full Burst] gauge reaches 100%, [Full Burst] activates: Amp Crash → Crescendo Scream, Rising Spin Kick → Unlimited Shout (cooldowns reset); Break effectiveness of Shouting Kick +25%; Shouting Kick damage +10%; Max HP +10%; [Super Armor] while active; [Tempo] removed and cannot activate; Duration: 10s.

advancements: [Full Burst] gauge charge rate increases by 100%. When Amp Crash, Crescendo Scream, Rising Spin Kick, or Unlimited Shout hits, activates [Distortion] on target: damage taken +3%, Duration: 10s, stacks up to 3 times; at max stacks activates [Breakdown] (damage taken +15%, Fire damage taken +20%, Duration: 20s, Distortion removed while active). When Kill the Stage hits, activates [Breakdown] on target.

[Full Burst] effect is enhanced. Using Kill the Stage activates [Afterglow] on entire team: damage to Broken targets +12%, Basic Skill and Ultimate Skill damage +15%, Critical Hit damage +15%, Duration: 20s.
Fire team members' Fire damage increases by 5% for every Fire ally in the party.

[Distortion], [Breakdown], and [Afterglow] effects enhanced. Distortion: damage taken +6%, 15s, stacks up to 3. Breakdown: damage taken +20%, Fire damage taken +25%, 30s. Afterglow: damage to Broken +12%, Basic/Ultimate Skill damage +30%, Critical Hit damage +20%, 30s.
